children.text:
This section explains the purpose of the slide and provides structured information relevant to the topic being discussed. The language is neutral and factual, allowing the content to be reused across different presentation types without implying a specific.

The information presented here is intended to support understanding by breaking down the subject into clear, readable paragraphs. This structure helps demonstrate spacing, hierarchy, and readability within a professional presentation layout.
